data.content: Needs changes: src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:946, src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:1228, and src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:1573 correctly append [agent: <label>] to the Claimed and TAKE log lines, so the behavior change itself appears implemented. However, the required automated coverage is still not reviewable because bun test src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts fails before assertions; src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts:86 calls vi.importActual, which is undefined in this runner, producing TypeError: vi.importActual is not a function. Until that test file executes and asserts the logging behavior, this does not satisfy implementation_review.
